Video.summary: Brooklyn arroja luz sobre por qué una mujer casada contrajo una ETS; el marido de Brittany no es el único del que debería desconfiar; el novio de Brianna y su cómplice la han estado utilizando.
Video.title: Maridos Horribles

Video.summary: Destiny says that her daughter has unexplained bruises after visiting Brian. She also says the child told her someone grabbed her neck and threw her against a wall. Brian denies the abuse and believes that it is either Destiny or her boyfriend.
Video.title: Did You Hurt Our Daughter?

Video.summary: Melinda says that she should be given custody of Tiffany's son because Tiffany is allowing her boyfriends to physically abuse the boy. Tiffany swears that the abuse Is coming from the boys father Scott and not from her boyfriends.
Video.title: Results Reveal The Truth

Video.summary: Bobbie says that her daughter Cindy’s home was filled with so many dangerous animals that she was forced to report her to child protective services because she felt her grandchild was in danger. But Cindy says Bobbie has another agenda!
Video.title: A Dangerous Household

Video.summary: Tacarra has been with Jaray for 5 years and raising two children together. But now she feels the passion has died and his coldness towards her has driven her crazy, and now she questions her marriage, and Jaray's honesty.
Video.title: Is It Love ... Or Lies?

Video.summary: Lisa's husband, Mickey, moved his mistress into their house 3 months ago! Then LaTasha's boyfriend, Maurice, has been cheating with transsexual Day Day! Maurice says it's over with Day Day, but much to his surprise, LaTasha won't take him back!
Video.title: Heartless Affairs!

Video.summary: A woman acts as her daughter's pimp; a man's mother and girlfriend feud.
Video.title: Aspiring Prostitutes & a Drunk

Video.summary: Three women fight over the same man; a woman must choose between marrying her fiancé or her cousin.
Video.title: Springer Weddings

Video.summary: Competitive twins fight over prom date; man admits to cheating and wants to make things right.
Video.title: My Twin Stole My Prom Date

Image.alt: My Twin Stole My Prom Date
My Twin Stole My Prom Date
My Twin Stole My Prom Date

Video.summary: Dustin admits to cheating on his partner with his middle-school crush; psychic Nana says she has a premonition that her fiance is sleeping with her friend; Desiree believes that another woman is contending with her over her boyfriend.
Video.title: Frenemies Attack!

Video.summary: Jake is here because he says that he knew he was in love with his girlfriend Lindsey the first time she ever asked him for a side of cheese. Then Shaina says she's in love with not one but two beautiful girls.
Video.title: Surprise Proposals...And Punches

Video.summary: Pregnant Heather will not stand for her boyfriend's cheating, particularly since he's sleeping with his niece! Next Cindy is in a predicament: the man she loves doesn't want her anymore and another whom she doesn't love is begging to be with her!
Video.title: I'm Sleeping With My Uncle

Video.summary: Jay admits to cheating on his girlfriend with a woman who wants to take it to the next level; Parail demands to know the truth about his baby-mama and his best friend; Sam has a list of reasons why he wants to break up with his fiancee.
Video.title: Snowed In Sex

Video.summary: Crystal has been sending explicit photos to her roommate's boyfriend; Kevin wants to give Jessica a dream wedding; Mario wants to confess.
Video.title: Fling Fall Outs

Video.summary: After Marcus got out of prison, he found his calling with the lord and quickly established himself as a minister. But he hasn't exactly freed himself of trouble, because he's been sleeping with two women, Nay and Strawberry!
Video.title: Sex With Two Sisters!

Video.summary: Brooklyn sheds light on why a married woman contracted an STD; Brittany's husband is not the only one she should distrust; Brianna's boyfriend and his accomplice have been using her.
Video.title: Horrible Husbands

Video.summary: A Navy man suspects his girlfriend is cheating on him; a woman sleeps with her sister's boyfriend.
Video.title: A Navy Man & A Commie

Video.summary: Sylvia loves one-night-stands and faces her angry sister Jackqueline for sleeping with her man! Then, Greg’s one-night stand left him doubting his long-term relationship!
Video.title: Feisty One Night Stands

Video.summary: Kitty came to the show to pose nude for our audience and a camera man while "fooling around" with her friend, Naomi! Next Gee is here to finally get even with her sister, Jenny, for sleeping with her man.
Video.title: Naughty Girls

Video.summary: Felicia is here to confront her boyfriend and her mother who have been sleeping together for months! Next Susan must come clean to her boyfriend and tell him she's prostituting again!
Video.title: Brawlin' Broads!

Video.summary: Steve helps Jason, a father desperate to straighten out his son, Brandon, who likes to steal, vandalize, and sell drugs. Today Steve’s taking Brandon to Wayne County Jail to give him a preview of where he might end up if he doesn’t clean up his act.
Video.title: Steve, Lock Up My Son

Video.summary: Angela and James have separated after many years of marriage and she believes that James' new girlfriend has molested her daughters. Now she is demanding a lie detector test! Plus, Stevisha's husband Ira thinks she's cheating.
Video.title: Bitter Ex or Concerned Mother?

Video.summary: Mindy wants Michael to step up to the plate, be a father, and help support his child. His new girlfriend Tanya also wants Michael to be involved in his child's life, but after hearing the lie detector results, she too might question her man.
Video.title: I Want Him To Love Me

Image.alt: I Want Him To Love Me
I Want Him To Love Me
I Want Him To Love Me

Video.summary: Tasha wants to prove to her ex boyfriend Martin that he's the father of her 4 year old daughter. Martin's sister says that she thinks the child might belong to her boyfriend Terrence because they had a threesome a year ago. Who's the real father?
Video.title: I Had a Threesome: Who's the Dad?

Image.alt: I Had a Threesome: Who's the Dad?
I Had a Threesome: Who's the Dad?
I Had a Threesome: Who's the Dad?

Video.summary: Updates on Justin, who said his girlfriend flirted with other men in front of him and acted provocatively whenever another man was around, and Adonis, who admitted he was living a double life with two women in the same home.
Video.title: Updates: Memorable Guests

Video.summary: According to Drew, the baby was bottle-fed gin and died. Shawn, the grieving mother, claims she had no prior knowledge of the bottle containing gin and believes it was tampered with, possibly by her own sister and friend. Who’s responsible?
Video.title: A Fatal Mistake

Video.summary: A couple who have been together for 15 years take lie-detector tests to prove they have been faithful; Shawn says his wife's accusations of cheating got him fired; Deysha found out her boyfriend is married.
Video.title: Rumor is "You're Cheating!"

Video.summary: Taking a stand! After years of abuse and living in fear, Kristen finally thought she found the strength to leave her abusive relationship with Terrell behind. He openly admits to abusing Kristen and taking his rage out on her, but thinks he can change for the better. Changing a bad habit is never easy, but Steve may be the last hope this family has.
Video.title: You Won't Beat Me Again

Video.summary: Curtis sat down with his mother Telisha, and told her that he is trying to have a baby but Telisha was shocked and terrified because Curtis is only 13 years old! Curtis insists he is ready to be a father.
Video.title: 13 Year Old Father?

Video.summary: A man takes a lie-detector test after being accused of hurting his girlfriend's child.
Video.title: You Failed Five Times?

Video.summary: Katie’s fed up with her brother-in-law Gary’s racist and disrespectful behavior. His conduct has landed him in jail, isolated him from his biracial niece, and is now influencing his 5-year-old daughter. Will he change for the better?
Video.title: Steve Confronts a Racist

Video.summary: Nykki, Jayda, Tammy and Pamela are here because Larry has fathered children with them. They say Larry not only an abusive deadbeat, but also engages in drugs, alcohol and pimps some of them out. Don’t miss the drama today!
Video.title: Steve is Speechless

Video.summary: George thinks his girlfriend is sleeping with her daughter's boyfriend; Adam says Tiffany has been trying for six years to trick him into confessing that he has been cheating on her.
Video.title: I Know She's Cheating With Her Daughter's Boyfriend

Image.alt: I Know She's Cheating With Her Daughter's Boyfriend
I Know She's Cheating With Her Daughter's Boyfriend
I Know She's Cheating With Her Daughter's Boyfriend
